name_en: M13664 White Multicolore (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
name_cn:
M13664 White Multicolore (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
This key pouch from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue is crafted from coated canvas. The vibrant signature print twists the House's iconic Monogram pattern with the Japanese artist's rainbow palette. It is secured with a silver zip and includes a chain with a hook to keep keys safe.
Size: 12 x 7 x 1.5 cm
